heading: cyIs the defendant claiming for a specific sum of money?
claimAmountLabel: cyHow much is the defendant claiming for?
maxClaimAmountLabel: cyWhat’s the maximum value of the defendant’s claim?
specificFeeText:
cyThe defendant’s counterclaim fee (the fee the defendant will pay to make this counterclaim) depends on the amount the defendant is claiming for.

cyIf you want to check how much the defendant’s fee will be, you can estimate how much it will cost the defendant to make their counterclaim (opens in new tab)
noSpecificFeeText:
cyIf you do not know the specific sum the defendant is claiming for, the court needs to know what they believe the maximum value of the claim will be.

cyIf you do not know the exact amount, give an estimate.

isClaimAmountKnown.required: cySelect if the defendant is claiming for a specific sum of money

claimAmount.required: cyEnter how much the defendant is claiming for
claimAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant is claiming for must be less than £1 billion
claimAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant is claiming for must be £0.00 or above
claimAmount.invalidFormat: cyEnter how much the defendant is claiming for in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50

estimatedMaxClaimAmount.required: cyEnter the maximum value of the defendant’s claim
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.largeAmount: cyThe maximum value the defendant is claiming for must be less than £1 billion
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.negative: cyThe maximum value the defendant is claiming for must be £0.00 or above
estimatedMaxClaimAmount.invalidFormat: cyEnter the maximum value of the defendant’s claim in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
